positive: A stylized, symmetrical depiction of an astronaut floating through a vibrant nebula. The astronaut is rendered in a minimalist, clean silhouette style, viewed from the front, holding a gentle, stylized flower. The background is an intense blend of deep midnight blues, electric purples, and cyan streaks, contrasted by brilliant starlight and cosmic dust clouds. The composition must be perfectly central, highly symmetrical, and suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use strong, graphic linework and high contrast to make the silhouette pop against the detailed, luminous background. Concept: 'Celestial Wanderer'.
